system.description:
Space Marines are genetically gifted with great strength far exceeding that of normal men. In times of need, a Battle-Brother can push this great brawn to its limits to perform truly impressive feats. Once per day of game time, a Battle-Brother may perform a Feat of Strength. This ability effectively increases his Unnatural Strength Trait by one level, so for instance Unnatural Strength ×2 becomes Unnatural Strength ×3. This effect lasts for a number of Rounds equal to his Rank.

RankImprovement
3Also adds +10 to all Strength Tests and Strength-based Skill Tests
5Duration increases to Rounds equal to twice the character's Rank
7Unnatural Strength Trait increases by two levels instead of one
system.effect: Increases Unnatural Strength by one level for Rounds equal to Rank (once per day)

improvements.effect: Also adds +10 to all Strength Tests and Strength-based Skill Tests
Duration increases to Rounds equal to twice Rank
Unnatural Strength increases by two levels instead of one
